mapper.select: SELECT SALARY_TYPE_CODE FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE IN ( SELECT CARGO_CODE FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL WHERE ID IN ( SELECT WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID FROM T_PRD_SALARY WHERE WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID = #{workTicketDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID ) )

SELECT ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PIECE_PROJECT_CODE, PIECE_PROJECT_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, USER_BY, USER_BY_NAME, COEFFICIENT, SALARY_PRICE_ID, PRICE, QUANTITY, TON, AMOUNT, SALARY_STATUS_CODE, SALARY_STATUS_NAME, TPS.SALARY_TYPE_CODE, TPS.SALARY_TYPE_NAME, REMARK, SALARY_SUMMARY_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME FROM T_PRD_SALARY where ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PIECE_PROJECT_CODE, PIECE_PROJECT_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, USER_BY, USER_BY_NAME, COEFFICIENT, SALARY_PRICE_ID, PRICE, QUANTITY, TON, AMOUNT, SALARY_STATUS_CODE, SALARY_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, SALARY_SUMMARY_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME,SALARY_TYPE_CODE,SALARY_TYPE_NAME,WORK_TICKET_ID,PROCESS_CODE,PROCESS_NAME,SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID,SHIP_VOYAGE, CARGO_CODE,CARGO_NAME,ODD_PLAN_ID FROM T_PRD_SALARY WHERE SALARY_STATUS_CODE != '10' AND ODD_PLAN_ID IN
#{oddId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_PRD_SALARY(ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PIECE_PROJECT_CODE, PIECE_PROJECT_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, USER_BY, USER_BY_NAME, COEFFICIENT, SALARY_PRICE_ID, PRICE, QUANTITY, TON, AMOUNT, SALARY_STATUS_CODE, SALARY_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, SALARY_SUMMARY_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME,SALARY_TYPE_CODE,SALARY_TYPE_NAME,WORK_TICKET_ID,PROCESS_CODE,PROCESS_NAME,SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID,SHIP_VOYAGE, CARGO_CODE,CARGO_NAME,ODD_PLAN_ID, IS_ODD) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.workTicketDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.workDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.pieceProjectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.pieceProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processDetailCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processDetailName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.userBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.userByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.coefficient, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.salaryPriceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.salaryStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.salaryStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.salarySummaryId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.examineBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.examineByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.examineTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{entity.salaryTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.salaryTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.workTicketId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.shipVoyageItemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.shipVoyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.oddPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.isOdd, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT MPP.ID,MPP.COMPANY_ID,MPP.DEPT_ID,MWP.PROCESS_CD,MPP.SALARY_TYPE_CODE,MPP.PRICE, MPP.COMPANY_NAME,MPP.DEPT_NAME,MPP.SALARY_TYPE_NAME,MPP.WORK_PROCESS_CHILD_NAME FROM M_PIECE_PRICE MPP LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS MWP ON MPP.WORK_PROCESS_CHILD_ID = MWP.ID
SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE IS_SALARY_BY_PROCESS = '1'
